question_text: In a laboratory experiment, the behavior of cats are studied for a particular food preference between two foods A and B. For an experiment, 70% of the cats that had food A will prefer food A, and 50% of the cats that had food B will prefer food

options.A: The experiment is repeated under identical conditions. If 40% of the cats had food A in the first experiment, then the percentage (rounded off to one decimal place) of cats those will prefer food A in the third experiment, is ______
